concerns.text: Task T008 ('Create base Subject entity model') is placed in Phase 2 (Foundational) but depends on T005 ('Create data schema definitions'). The schema (T005) defines the structure the model (T008) must implement. T008 should follow T005 to ensure the model is built against the defined contract, not before.

Task T011 (Implement download.py) and T012 (Implement preprocess.py) are marked [P] (parallel) in the list, but T012 explicitly consumes the output of T011 (downloaded fMRI data). T012 cannot run in parallel with T011; it must be sequential. The [P] tag is incorrect and creates a hidden ordering violation.

Task T018 (Implement sliding-window connectivity) and T019 (Implement Louvain) are marked [P]. However, T019 (Louvain) consumes the connectivity matrices generated by T018. T019 cannot run in parallel with T018. The [P] tag is incorrect.
Task T025 (Spearman correlation) and T026 (Bonferroni correction) are marked [P]. T026 applies correction to the results of T025. T026 cannot run in parallel with T025. The [P] tag is incorrect.

Task T032 (Permutation testing) and T033 (Calculate permutation p-values) are marked [P]. T033 consumes the null distribution generated by T032. T033 cannot run in parallel with T032. The [P] tag is incorrect.

Task T014 ('Implement Data Gap handling') is listed after T012 (preprocess). Logically, the check for data availability (T014) must precede the attempt to preprocess (T012) to avoid unnecessary execution or errors. T014 should be moved before T012 or integrated into T011/T012 logic flow.
